name: medical-mechanical-design-assistant
description: A constrained, traceable solution-design workstation for medical and laboratory automation projects: intake, evidence review, maturity gates, process flowcharts, 2D HTML three-view displays, risk scoring, and verification planning.

interface.shortDescription: Structured medical and lab automation solution design workflow.
interface.longDescription: Helps teams turn existing project materials into traceable solution designs: maturity gating, process decomposition, total/swimlane/exception/data flowcharts, 2D HTML three-view displays, per-step actor/object/external-mechanism/risk/score definition, missing-material requests, preliminary risk review, and verification planning. AI drafts and challenges solutions; engineers remain responsible for judgment, approval, and validation.
defaultPrompt: 根据已有资料整理项目方案，并列出还缺哪些关键资料。
把当前流程拆成工艺步骤，标明每步的操作主体、对象、外部机构、风险点和评分。
生成方案成熟度判断、总流程图/泳道图/异常流程图/数据流图，以及二维 HTML 三视图草图。
